comment: Best Oxford shirt I've owned. The fabric is crisp without being stiff, and it holds its shape all day.
Great quality shirt. The blue is exactly as shown — not too bright, very wearable.
Good shirt but runs slightly small across the shoulders. Sized up and it was perfect.
Perfect everyday shirt. Looks sharp tucked in or worn casually. Buying a second one.
Very clean look. Great for the office. The collar holds its shape nicely throughout the day.
These black jeans are incredible. The colour is deep and consistent — no fading after washes.
Really solid jeans. Slim fit is flattering and comfortable. Would recommend sizing up in the waist.
Great everyday black denim. Versatile enough for work or going out.
This merino polo is exceptional. Incredibly soft and the grey is a perfect neutral.
Worth every penny. Wore it under a jacket and it looked and felt amazing all day.
Great quality wool. Fits slightly large so I'd recommend sizing down if in doubt.
This jacket is worth every cent. The structure is incredible and it elevates any outfit.
Excellent construction. The wool is heavy and luxurious. A true investment piece.
Beautiful jacket. Fits slightly long in the body but the shoulders are perfect.
The white version is perfect — clean and bright without being see-through.
Bought both colours. The grey is my favourite — great everyday tee.
Holds its shape after washing. The crew neck sits perfectly — not too tight.
The best trucker jacket I've ever worn. The denim is stiff in the best way and will only get better.
Classic piece. The indigo is rich and the stitching is solid. Slightly boxy but that's the design.
The brown polo is such a great colour for autumn. Fits perfectly and breathes really well.
Bought the grey. Very smart casual look — pairs perfectly with the cotton trousers.
Premium quality for the price. The piqué texture is well done and it doesn't pill.
Classic straight jean in a great mid-wash. Goes with everything I own.
Very wearable wash — not too light, not too dark. Good quality denim.
Exactly what I needed. Minimal design, great laptop protection, and quality zips.
Great everyday bag. Holds a lot more than it looks. Could use one more external pocket.
Got the black — perfect structured cap. Sits well and the brim curve is just right.
Got the white version. Clean and versatile. The adjustable strap is easy to use.
Best trousers I've bought in years. The taper is subtle and the waistband is super comfortable.
Great fit and the sand colour is very versatile. Runs slightly short but fine with the right shoes.
